/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesplugin.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesplugin.so CMakeFiles/fawkesplugin.dir/net/list_message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesplugin.dir/net/handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesplugin.dir/listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesplugin.dir/manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesplugin.dir/loader.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -lstdc++ -lelf /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesconfig.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -ldl /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -ldl -luuid -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -lpthread /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -L/usr/lib64 -lyaml-cpp -lstdc++ -lsqlite3
